evidence.fact: The system allocates each flight the earliest available 5-minute slot on either runway at or after its estimated time.
evidence.fact_span: The system allocates each flight the earliest available 5-minute slot on either runway at or after its estimated time.

evidence.claim: The system detects a scheduling violation
evidence.fact: The system detects gap-violating assignments on the same runway.
evidence.fact_span: detects gap-violating assignments on the same runway.
